name: repeated-timeout-pattern
description: customer-support-bot has 12% error rate over the last 6 hours. All errors are 'connection timeout' on the retrieval step. 18 traces affected — a sustained pattern, not a one-off.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

error.error_message: Error: connect ETIMEDOUT 10.0.2.15:6333 - connection to vector store timed out after 30000ms

duration.note: error traces all hit the 30s timeout
